zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Starlyng於大約1520年出生在英國英格蘭艾可迪德哈姆時，她的父親Robert Starlyng22歲，母親Mrs. Rose Starling22歲。她於1544年5月7日之前與William Ravens在英國艾可迪德哈姆結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1584年10月10日在她的家鄉享年65歲，埋葬在英國艾可迪德哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Starlyng于大约1520年出生在英国英格兰艾可迪德哈姆时，她的父亲Robert Starlyng22岁，母亲Mrs. Rose Starling22岁。她于1544年5月7日之前与William Ravens在英国艾可迪德哈姆结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1584年10月10日在她的家乡享年65岁，埋葬在英国艾可迪德哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Starlyng
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Stallings
meanings: English: prrobably an altered form of   Starling  . This surname is also common among African Americans.
History: The majority of the American bearers of this surname trace their origin to Nicholas Stallings from England, who settled in VA in the 17th century.

variants.name: Sterling
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Starling, Sterling (Old English Stærling), itself from the bird-name, whose use as a nickname may also be another source of the surname. Compare Stare 2.
German: from Middle High German sterlinc, the name of a coin, hence probably a nickname for someone who paid that amount in rent.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Starlyng was born about 1520, in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert Starlyng, was 22 and her mother, Mrs. Rose Starling, was 22. She married William Ravens before 7 May 1544, in Dedham, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 10 October 1584, in her hometown, at the age of 65, and was buried in Dedham, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Starlyng est née environ 1520, à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert Starlyng, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Rose Starling, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé William Ravens avant 7 mai 1544, à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 10 octobre 1584, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joan Starlyng um 1520 in Dedham, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert Starlyng 22 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Rose Starling 22. Sie hat vor 7. Mai 1544 in Dedham, Essex, England William Ravens geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 10. Oktober 1584 im Alter von 65 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Dedham, Essex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Starlyng è nata il circa 1520 nel Dedham, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert Starlyng, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Rose Starling, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato William Ravens prima del 7 maggio 1544, nel Dedham, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 10 ottobre 1584, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Dedham, Essex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Starlyngが約1520年にイギリスイギリスエセックスデドハムで生まれた時，父Robert Starlyngは22歳，母Mrs. Rose Starlingは22歳であった。1544年5月7日以前にイギリスエセックスデドハムでWilliam Ravensと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1584年10月10日に故郷で65歳で死去し，イギリスエセックスデドハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Starlyng(이)가 대략 1520년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 데드함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert Starlyng(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Rose Starling(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1544년 5월 7일 이전 영국 에세스 데드함에서 William Ravens(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1584년 10월 10일 그녀의 고향에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 에세스 데드함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joan Starlyng nasceu aproximadamente 1520, em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert Starlyng, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Rose Starling, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com William Ravens antes 7 de maio de 1544, em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 10 de outubro de 1584, em sua cidade natal, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Starlyng родилась около 1520 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert Starlyng было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Rose Starling, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Ravens перед 7 май 1544 г. в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 10 октября 1584 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joan Starlyng nació aproximadamente 1520, en Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert Starlyng, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Mrs. Rose Starling, tenía 22 años. Se casó con William Ravens antes de 7 de mayo de 1544, en Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 10 de octubre de 1584, en su pueblo, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra.
